title: Crispy Croatian Potato Hash
description: Savory, crispy postworkout dish with tangy red wine vinegar and crunchy pickles, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Wash and dice the potatoes into ½‑inch cubes.
Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the potatoes for 3 minutes; drain and pat dry with paper towels.
Heat olive oil and butter in a large skillet over medium‑high heat until hot.
Add the potatoes to the skillet, cooking for 6‑7 minutes and turning occasionally until golden and crispy.
Add the diced onion and cook for 3 minutes until translucent.
Stir in the pickles, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper; cook for another 2 minutes.
Drizzle the red wine vinegar over the mixture, toss to coat, and cook for 1 more minute.
Transfer to a serving dish and sprinkle with fresh parsley if desired. Serve hot.
